$schema: v2 memory recall corpus — multi-turn dialogues where turn N's correct answer requires recalling content from turn 1–3. Drives M2 (Tier 4 read), M3 (Tier 5 read), and M4 (Tier 2/3 read) regression suites. Phase status: empty in M0; populated incrementally per phase per docs/MEMORY_DESIGN.md §8.

expect.tiers_consulted: array of integers — which tiers must be hit on the final turn
expect.slots_present: array of strings — which prompt slots must be non-empty in the combine prompt
expect.response_contains: string — substring that must appear in the final response
